site.name: ToolBoxy
site.description: 100+ free online tools for PDF, image, video, text, and developer tasks. No installation required.

home.hero_description: 100+ free utilities for PDF, image, video, text and more. No sign-up required. Works in your browser.

upload.drop_here: Drop files here or click to upload

limits.upgrade_prompt: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited access
limits.daily_limit_reached: Daily limit reached. Upgrade to Pro or try again tomorrow.

errors.file_too_large: File is too large. Max size is {size}MB.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

toolDescriptions.pdf-to-text: Extract plain text from PDF files instantly in your browser. No upload to server needed.
toolDescriptions.base64-decoder: Decode Base64 encoded strings back to plain text. Supports Unicode / UTF-8.
toolDescriptions.url-decoder: Decode percent-encoded URLs back to human-readable text. Fast and private.
toolDescriptions.csv-to-json: Convert CSV data to JSON format. toolDescriptions.json-validator: Validate JSON syntax instantly. Paste your JSON and get clear error messages with line numbers.
toolDescriptions.json-to-csv: Convert JSON arrays to CSV format. Download or copy the result for use in Excel, Google Sheets, and more.
toolDescriptions.text-compare: Compare two texts side by side and highlight differences line by line. Perfect for spotting changes in code or documents.
toolDescriptions.yaml-to-json: Convert YAML configuration files to JSON format. Supports nested objects, lists, and all common YAML types.
toolDescriptions.css-minifier: Minify CSS by removing comments and whitespace. See the exact percentage saved and download the result.
toolDescriptions.cron-expression-parser: Parse and understand cron expressions. See a plain-English description and the next scheduled run times.
toolDescriptions.regex-tester: Test regular expressions against text in real time with match highlighting and group capture details.
toolDescriptions.unit-converter: Convert between units of length, weight, temperature, area, volume, speed, and data instantly.
toolDescriptions.timezone-converter: Convert date and time between any world timezone with a live world clock view.
toolDescriptions.color-palette-generator: Generate beautiful color palettes 脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗垄脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聙脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聰 monochromatic, analogous, complementary, triadic, and more.
toolDescriptions.image-compress: Compress and resize images in your browser to reduce file size without losing quality.
toolDescriptions.jpg-to-png: Convert JPG and JPEG images to lossless PNG format directly in your browser.
toolDescriptions.png-to-jpg: Convert PNG images to JPG with adjustable quality. Transparent areas filled white.
toolDescriptions.svg-to-png: Render SVG files to PNG at any scale. Paste SVG code or upload a file.
toolDescriptions.checksum-generator: Compute SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 checksums for files or text. Verify file integrity.
toolDescriptions.image-crop: Crop images by specifying pixel coordinates. No upload required 脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗垄脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聙脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聰 runs in browser.
toolDescriptions.html-entity-encoder: Encode special characters as HTML entities or decode HTML entities back to text.
toolDescriptions.number-base-converter: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal instantly.
toolDescriptions.unix-timestamp: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and vice versa. Includes a live clock.
toolDescriptions.word-frequency: Analyze word frequency in any text. See counts, percentages, and rankings.
toolDescriptions.url-parser: Parse any URL into components: protocol, host, path, query parameters, and hash.
toolDescriptions.random-number-generator: Generate random integers or decimals in any range. Supports unique numbers and bulk generation.
toolDescriptions.aspect-ratio-calculator: Calculate aspect ratios and scale dimensions. Supports common presets like 16:9 and 4:3.
toolDescriptions.binary-text-converter: Convert text to binary and binary back to text. Quick encoding/decoding tool.
toolDescriptions.percentage-calculator: Calculate percentages, find what percentage one number is of another, and compute percentage change.
toolDescriptions.json-minifier: Minify JSON by removing whitespace and formatting. Shows byte savings and allows download.
toolDescriptions.text-reverser: Reverse text by characters, words, or lines. Simple and fast text manipulation tool.
toolDescriptions.color-gradient-generator: Generate CSS gradients with custom colors, direction, and type. Includes preset themes.
toolDescriptions.roman-numeral-converter: Convert between numbers and Roman numerals. Supports values from 1 to 3999.
toolDescriptions.lorem-ipsum-generator: Generate Lorem Ipsum placeholder text by paragraphs, sentences, or words.
toolDescriptions.css-box-shadow-generator: Visually create CSS box shadows with sliders for offset, blur, spread, color, and opacity.
toolDescriptions.string-length-counter: Count characters, words, bytes, lines, and sentences in any text. Click any stat to copy.
toolDescriptions.temperature-converter: Convert between Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin, and Rankine temperature units.
toolDescriptions.morse-code-converter: Convert text to Morse code and Morse code back to text. Includes quick reference chart.
toolDescriptions.countdown-timer: Simple countdown timer with presets. Pause, resume, and reset with a visual progress bar.
toolDescriptions.character-counter: Count characters, words, bytes, lines, sentences and more. Includes reading time estimate.
toolDescriptions.color-mixer: Mix multiple colors by weight. Shows the blended result in HEX, RGB, and HSL.
toolDescriptions.text-to-slug: Convert any text into a URL-friendly slug with custom separator and case options.
toolDescriptions.csv-viewer: View and search CSV files in a table. Drag & drop files or paste CSV text directly.
toolDescriptions.color-codes-converter: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats. Visual color picker included.
toolDescriptions.diff-checker: Compare two texts side by side and highlight line-by-line differences. Shows added and removed lines.
toolDescriptions.number-formatter: Format numbers as currency, percent, scientific notation, or compact form across 7 locales.
toolDescriptions.json-diff: Deep-compare two JSON objects and list every added, removed, or changed field by path.
toolDescriptions.html-formatter: Format and pretty-print HTML with configurable indentation. Download or copy the result.
toolDescriptions.stopwatch: Precise stopwatch with lap tracking. Supports hundreds of laps with split and total times.
toolDescriptions.sql-formatter: Format and pretty-print SQL queries with keyword highlighting and configurable indentation.
toolDescriptions.image-base64-converter: Convert images to Base64 strings and decode Base64 back to viewable images.
toolDescriptions.markdown-preview: Live side-by-side Markdown editor with rendered preview. Supports headings, links, code blocks.
toolDescriptions.yaml-validator: Validate YAML syntax and display a JSON representation of top-level keys.
toolDescriptions.line-sort: Sort, deduplicate, reverse, or shuffle lines of text. Supports case-insensitive and trim options.
toolDescriptions.number-sequence-generator: Generate number sequences with custom start, end, step, separator, prefix, and suffix.
toolDescriptions.word-wrap: Wrap long text at a specified column width using word, character, or break mode.
toolDescriptions.text-statistics: Detailed text analysis: characters, words, sentences, reading ease score, and character frequency.
toolDescriptions.color-scheme-generator: Generate harmonious color palettes using analogous, complementary, triadic, and more schemes.
toolDescriptions.html-to-markdown: Convert HTML to Markdown automatically. Handles headings, links, lists, code, and formatting.
toolDescriptions.text-padder: Pad text lines to a fixed width with left, right, or center alignment using any character.
toolDescriptions.json-schema-validator: Validate JSON data against a JSON Schema. Checks types, required fields, enums, and ranges.
toolDescriptions.css-gradient-generator: Create linear, radial, and conic CSS gradients with multi-stop color controls.
toolDescriptions.xml-formatter: Format or minify XML with configurable indentation. Instantly readable output with download support.
toolDescriptions.epoch-converter: Convert Unix epoch timestamps to readable dates and vice versa. Supports seconds, milliseconds, and multiple timezones.
toolDescriptions.text-repeater: Repeat any text a specified number of times with custom separators like newline, space, or comma.
toolDescriptions.column-extractor: Extract specific columns from CSV or delimited text. Click columns to toggle selection, choose custom separators.
toolDescriptions.bracket-matcher: Validate bracket matching in code. Highlights matched pairs by depth and pinpoints mismatched or unclosed brackets.
